problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: The key to Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? is Attention mechanism with linear complexity — specifically Attention mechanism with — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
